title.tr: EFI System Partition Microsoft Minimumunun Altinda
title.en: EFI System Partition Below Microsoft Minimum

risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'UEFI/GPT-based hard drive partitions' (18 May 2026 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft alintisi: 'The EFI system partition must meet the following minimum size requirements for the storage device type: 512 native/512e byte sector size: minimum 200 MB; 4K native sector size: minimum 300 MB.' Eskiden 100 MB yeterliydi; Microsoft yeni belgede 200 MB minimum talep ediyor.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'UEFI/GPT-based hard drive partitions' (updated 2026-05-18). Microsoft quote: 'The EFI system partition must meet the following minimum size requirements for the storage device type: 512 native/512e byte sector size: minimum 200 MB; 4K native sector size: minimum 300 MB.' Older docs said 100 MB; new Microsoft minimum is 200 MB.

prerequisites.tr: Tam veri yedegi (temiz kurulum sistem diskini siler)
prerequisites.en: Full backup (clean install wipes system drive)

body.tr: 512-byte sektor disk: en az 200 MB. 4K native sektor disk: en az 300 MB. FAT32 formatli olmali. Microsoft alintisi: 'This partition is managed by the operating system, and should not contain any other files, including Windows RE tools.'
body.en: 512-byte sector disk: minimum 200 MB. 4K native sector disk: minimum 300 MB. Must be FAT32. Microsoft quote: 'This partition is managed by the operating system, and should not contain any other files, including Windows RE tools.'

body.tr: 100 MB ESP'lerde Win11 25H2 feature update'leri basarisiz oluyor. Microsoft Q&A: 'Windows 11 25H2 upgrade fails on systems with 100MB EFI System Partition'. Microsoft destekli cozum: temiz kurulum.
body.en: Win11 25H2 feature updates fail on 100 MB ESPs. Microsoft Q&A: 'Windows 11 25H2 upgrade fails on systems with 100MB EFI System Partition'. Microsoft-supported resolution: clean install.

title.tr: Mevcut ESP'nin boyutu ve sektor turu
title.en: Check current ESP size and sector type

steps.command: $p = Get-Partition | Where-Object Type -eq System | Select -First 1; $d = Get-Disk -Number $p.DiskNumber; [PSCustomObject]@{ESP_MB=[int]($p.Size/1MB); SectorBytes=$d.LogicalSectorSize}

body.tr: Windows 11 kurulumu otomatik standart bir ESP olusturur. Adimlar: (a) tum veriyi yedekle, (b) Media Creation Tool ile USB bootable yap, (c) USB'den boot et, (d) Custom Install > tum sistem diski partition'larini Delete > New > Next. Microsoft 11 indirme: https://www.microsoft.com/software-download/windows11
body.en: Windows 11 setup auto-creates a standard ESP. Steps: (a) back up all data, (b) make a bootable USB via Media Creation Tool, (c) boot from USB, (d) Custom Install > Delete all system disk partitions > New > Next. Win11 download: https://www.microsoft.com/software-download/windows11

body.tr: EaseUS Partition Master, MiniTool Partition Wizard gibi araclar ESP genisletme iddia eder. Microsoft bunlari resmen destekleyemez - donusum sirasinda veri kaybi veya sistem acilmama riski vardir. Ana sistem diskinde DENENMEYIN.
body.en: Tools like EaseUS Partition Master, MiniTool Partition Wizard claim to resize ESP. Microsoft does not officially support these - data loss or boot failure risk during conversion. DO NOT TRY on production system disk.
